rules.D1: every per_claim row has non-empty citation
rules.D2: citation parses to at least one (author, venue, year) tuple
rules.D5: originator policy citations match the originating publication (GRASP→Faldu HPCA 2020, POPT[+derived]→Balaji HPCA 2021, SRRIP→Jaleel ISCA 2010), OR the citation is an explicit cross-attribution where the policy name appears in the citation string AND the parsed venue is in the whitelist
rules.D6: every citation contains a locator (§N | Fig N | Tab N | Table N | Section N)
rules.D7: corpus uses at least 10 distinct citation strings
